name: SignInSummaryByCountry
description: Hourly aggregation of successful and failed sign-ins by country and application for cost-effective trend analysis.
query:
SigninLogs
| summarize SuccessCount = countif(ResultType == 0), FailureCount = countif(ResultType != 0), DistinctUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName) by Location = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion), AppDisplayName
